title: Pepsi Ad Backlash
storyIntro: You are the PR Director. A new commercial featuring Kendall Jenner handing a soda to a police officer at a protest has just aired. Twitter is tearing it apart for trivializing serious social justice movements. You need to manage the fallout.
brief: PepsiCo is facing national outrage after releasing a tone-deaf commercial co-opting civil rights protests. Brands and minority groups are calling for a total boycott.

agents.name: Manager
agents.message: We thought this ad would be unifying. What a disaster. What do we do?

agents.name: Teammate
agents.message: We need to pull the video off YouTube right now.

winCondition: Ad pulled and sincere apology issued.
loseCondition: Brand permanently damaged by defensive statements.

expected_actions: Remove the video from all platforms
Draft and publish a public apology

detection.ai_behavior_shift: The Manager is concerned but unsure of severity.

investigation.ai_behavior_shift: The Manager becomes increasingly worried as reports come in.

escalation.ai_behavior_shift: The Manager demands immediate action as influencers withdraw.

mitigation.ai_behavior_shift: The Manager focuses on minimizing damage and restoring trust.

recovery.ai_behavior_shift: The Manager shifts to long-term reputation repair.

evolving_logs: [CRITICAL] Major news outlets begin covering the backlash with negative headlines.
[WARNING] Protest hashtags targeting Pepsi trend globally with 1M+ tweets.
[ERROR] Stock price drops 5% in pre-market trading due to brand concerns.
[CRITICAL] Internal memo leaks showing marketing team ignored early warnings.
mitigation_path: crisis-cli notify_stakeholders --urgency critical --message "Full retraction in progress"

incorrect_action_consequences.crisis-cli defend_ad --double_down: Ad becomes protest symbol, 200% sentiment spike
incorrect_action_consequences.crisis-cli fire_agency --publicly: Creative partners leak damning internal documents

scenario_specific_outputs.crisis-cli get_stakeholder_status: ALERT: CMO demanding hourly updates | LEGAL reviewing liabilities
scenario_specific_outputs.crisis-cli ad_impact_report: ESTIMATED REACH: 38M views | PARTNER DROPS: 7 confirmed
